title: Exclusive London Meet & Greet
description: An intimate meet-and-greet with Gillian Anderson in the heart of London. Enjoy a personal welcome, a one-on-one conversation, and a professional photograph. This exclusive experience includes a signed commemorative print and a gift bag of curated Sanctuary merchandise. Guests will be welcomed into a private lounge with champagne and canapés before their personal audience with Gillian.
intensity: Smart casual dress code. Photo ID required for entry.

title: VIP Backstage Pass & Photo Session
description: The ultimate VIP experience. Go behind the curtain with a private backstage tour, then enjoy an extended personal photo session with Gillian. Receive a professional-grade portrait, a signed script from one of her acclaimed performances, and exclusive VIP merchandise. A champagne reception and gourmet catering are included.
intensity: Formal attire requested.

title: Intimate Dinner with Gillian
description: An unparalleled evening of fine dining and conversation with Gillian Anderson at one of London's most prestigious private members' clubs. Share a multi-course gourmet dinner crafted by a Michelin-starred chef, accompanied by rare wines. This is a rare opportunity for deep, meaningful conversation in an intimate setting of no more than six guests.
intensity: Black tie. Dietary requirements must be communicated 72 hours in advance.

title: Professional Portrait Session
description: A professional portrait session with Gillian Anderson in a curated studio setting. A world-class photographer will capture editorial-quality images. You will receive five professionally retouched digital photographs and one signed print. Hair and makeup styling is available upon request.
intensity: Wardrobe consultation provided upon booking.

title: West End Acting Masterclass
description: An intensive acting masterclass led by Gillian Anderson herself. Drawing on her decades of experience across stage and screen, Gillian will guide participants through scene study, character development, and the craft of truthful performance. Suitable for actors of all levels. Each participant receives personal feedback and a certificate of completion.
intensity: Please prepare a 2-minute monologue.

title: Theatre Masterclass: Shakespeare & Beyond
description: A full-day immersive theatre masterclass in the historic home of British theatre. Gillian will lead advanced scene studies from Shakespeare to contemporary drama, with focus on classical text, vocal technique, and physical storytelling. The day includes a backstage tour of the Royal Shakespeare Theatre and a private lunch.
intensity: Intermediate to advanced acting experience recommended.

title: Virtual Coffee Chat with Gillian
description: A relaxed 30-minute video call with Gillian Anderson from the comfort of your home. Perfect for fans who want a personal connection without travel. Discuss her work, your admiration, or simply enjoy a warm conversation. You will receive a personalized video message and a digital signed photograph after the call.
intensity: A stable internet connection is required.

title: Deep Dive Conversation
description: An extended one-on-one video conversation with Gillian Anderson. Go beyond the surface and explore topics that matter to you—her creative process, advocacy work, literary passions, or your own personal journey. This is a meaningful exchange rather than a simple meet-and-greet. Each session includes a signed book and a follow-up note from Gillian.
intensity: Topics and questions may be submitted in advance.

title: Script Reading Session: The X-Files
description: Join Gillian Anderson for a private script reading of a classic X-Files episode. Read scenes together in character, with Gillian providing direction and insight into the making of the iconic series. This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity for true X-Files enthusiasts. Includes a signed script copy and behind-the-scenes stories.
intensity: Familiarity with The X-Files series is recommended.

title: Script Analysis & Character Workshop
description: An intimate workshop where Gillian guides participants through the art of script analysis and character creation. Using scenes from her acclaimed work in The Crown, Sex Education, and The Fall, she will share her techniques for building complex, truthful characters. Each participant performs with personalised coaching.
intensity: Scripts will be provided upon booking.

title: Exclusive Q&A Session
description: An intimate Q&A session with Gillian Anderson in a private London venue. Ask your burning questions about her career, creative process, and advocacy work. Each ticket includes a glass of champagne, a signed photograph, and priority seating. Limited to 25 guests for an intimate atmosphere.
intensity: Questions may be submitted in advance for consideration.

title: Virtual Q&A: Ask Me Anything
description: A live virtual Q&A session with Gillian Anderson accessible from anywhere in the world. Submit your questions in real-time and hear Gillian's thoughts on her career, activism, and creative journey. All participants receive a digital gift pack including wallpapers and a personalized thank-you video.
intensity: Link provided 24 hours before the session.

title: Women's Leadership Conversation
description: An inspiring conversation with Gillian Anderson on women's leadership, advocacy, and creating meaningful change. Drawing on her UN ambassadorial work and personal journey, Gillian will share insights on navigating creative industries, finding your voice, and leading with compassion. Includes a networking reception.
intensity: Open to all genders and backgrounds.

title: The Art of Storytelling: A Masterclass
description: A virtual masterclass on the art of storytelling with Gillian Anderson. Explore how narrative shapes identity, culture, and change. Gillian will share her approach to selecting roles, developing characters, and using story as a vehicle for social impact. Interactive exercises and a live Q&A included.
intensity: No prior experience required.

title: Wellness Retreat Day
description: A serene wellness day in the beautiful English countryside. Join Gillian Anderson for a curated day of mindfulness, gentle yoga, nature walks, and nourishing conversation. The day includes a farm-to-table lunch, a guided meditation session, and personal time for reflection. Leave feeling refreshed, inspired, and connected.
intensity: Comfortable clothing and footwear recommended.

title: Mindfulness & Meditation Session
description: A guided mindfulness and meditation session with Gillian Anderson. Drawing on her personal practice, Gillian will lead participants through breathing exercises, visualization, and contemplative discussion. A calming and restorative experience from the comfort of your home.
intensity: Find a quiet, comfortable space.

title: Book Club with Gillian: Literary Salon
description: An elegant literary salon in a historic London bookshop. Gillian Anderson leads a discussion on a selected work of literature, sharing her perspectives as an avid reader and author. Includes a signed copy of the featured book, afternoon tea, and a curated reading list curated by Gillian herself.
intensity: The selected book will be announced upon booking.

title: Writing Workshop with Gillian
description: A creative writing workshop led by Gillian Anderson, focusing on personal narrative, memoir, and authentic voice. Drawing on her experience as a bestselling author and editor of the Want anthology, Gillian will guide participants through exercises designed to unlock their own stories. Suitable for writers of all levels.
intensity: Bring a notebook and pen, or a laptop.

title: Charity Gala Dinner with Gillian
description: A magnificent charity gala evening hosted by Gillian Anderson at a landmark London venue. The evening includes a champagne reception, five-course gourmet dinner, live auction, and entertainment. Proceeds support Gillian's chosen charitable foundations. Guests receive a luxury gift hamper and a personal thank-you letter from Gillian.
intensity: Black tie. A portion of the fee is tax-deductible as a charitable donation.

title: Charity Auction & Reception
description: An elegant charity reception and auction hosted by Gillian Anderson. Browse exclusive auction items including signed memorabilia, private dinners, and unique experiences. All proceeds benefit women's education and empowerment initiatives. Champagne and canapés served throughout the evening.
intensity: Cocktail attire.

title: Virtual Charity Concert & Conversation
description: A unique virtual charity event featuring musical performances, readings by Gillian Anderson, and a live conversation about the causes close to her heart. All proceeds go to selected charitable organizations. Participants receive a digital program and a charitable donation receipt.
intensity: Donation receipt provided for tax purposes.

title: One-on-One Mentorship Session
description: A private mentorship session with Gillian Anderson for aspiring actors, writers, or activists. Gillian will provide personalized guidance on career development, creative practice, and navigating the entertainment industry. This is a profound investment in your personal and professional growth, offering direct access to one of the most respected artists of our time.
intensity: Please submit a brief biography and your goals for the session upon booking.

title: Virtual Mentorship: Creative Careers
description: A virtual mentorship session with Gillian Anderson focused on building a career in the creative arts. Whether you are an aspiring actor, writer, director, or creative entrepreneur, Gillian will share her wisdom on perseverance, authenticity, and making your mark. Includes a follow-up email summary of key insights.
intensity: Please prepare 3 questions to make the most of your session.

title: Fundraising Gala Hosted by Gillian
description: Host your own fundraising event with Gillian Anderson as your guest of honour. Perfect for charitable organizations, foundations, or private groups looking to make a significant impact. Gillian will deliver a keynote speech, participate in a moderated discussion, and help drive donations for your cause. A transformative evening for any charitable initiative.
intensity: Please contact the Sanctuary team to discuss your cause and event requirements.

title: Virtual Fundraising Keynote
description: Gillian Anderson will deliver a virtual keynote address for your organization's fundraising event or gala. Choose from topics including women's empowerment, creative leadership, advocacy, or the power of storytelling. Includes a moderated Q&A with your audience. A portion of the fee can be directed to your chosen charity.
intensity: Technical rehearsal required 48 hours before the event.

title: Private Studio Tour
description: A private tour of Gillian Anderson's creative workspace in London. See where scripts are read, characters are developed, and ideas come to life. Gillian will personally guide you through her creative process, show props and memorabilia from her career, and share stories from behind the scenes of her most iconic roles.
intensity: Photography allowed in designated areas.

title: Archives & Memorabilia Tour
description: An exclusive tour of the Gillian Anderson archives, featuring costumes, scripts, photographs, and personal items from her remarkable career. Gillian will personally curate the tour, sharing the stories behind each item. Includes champagne and a private viewing of never-before-seen archival material.
intensity: White gloves provided for handling archival materials.

title: Annual Fan Appreciation Gala
description: The Sanctuary's annual fan appreciation event, hosted by Gillian Anderson. An evening of celebration, community, and gratitude. Enjoy live performances, a cocktail reception, a Q&A with Gillian, and the opportunity to connect with fellow fans from around the world. Every attendee receives an exclusive commemorative gift.
intensity: Open to all Sanctuary members and fans.

title: Fan Appreciation Virtual Gathering
description: A special virtual gathering for fans worldwide to connect with Gillian Anderson and the Sanctuary community. Live performance, group discussion, and a warm celebration of the fans who make the Sanctuary possible. Includes a digital gift pack and a chance to be featured in the next community highlight reel.
intensity: Link provided 48 hours before the event.

title: Film Screening & Discussion: The X-Files
description: A private screening of a classic X-Files episode or film, followed by a discussion with Gillian Anderson. Watch on a professional cinema screen in an intimate setting, then hear Gillian's memories and insights from the production. Includes popcorn, drinks, and a signed movie poster.
intensity: The featured episode/film will be announced upon booking.

title: The Crown: Behind the Scenes Screening
description: A private screening of selected episodes from The Crown, with behind-the-scenes commentary from Gillian Anderson. Learn how she approached the role of Margaret Thatcher, from the accent work to the costume design. Includes a Q&A session and a signed photograph from her time on set.
intensity: Filmed content is rated PG.

title: Riverside Breakfast with Gillian
description: A delightful morning meeting with Gillian Anderson at a picturesque riverside café in London. Enjoy a leisurely breakfast while discussing her work, your shared interests, or simply enjoying each other's company in a relaxed, natural setting. A warm and personal start to your day with one of the world's most beloved actresses.
intensity: Casual dress. Breakfast included.

title: Afternoon Tea at The Ritz
description: The quintessential British experience: afternoon tea with Gillian Anderson at The Ritz London. Enjoy a selection of fine teas, delicate sandwiches, and exquisite pastries in one of the world's most elegant settings. A truly memorable afternoon of conversation and refinement.
intensity: Smart formal attire required by The Ritz dress code.

title: Evening Virtual Wine Tasting
description: A sophisticated virtual wine tasting experience with Gillian Anderson. A curated selection of fine wines will be shipped to your home before the event. Gillian will guide you through the tasting, sharing her love of wine and the stories behind each vintage. A perfect evening of connection and indulgence.
intensity: Wines shipped to your address. Must be 21+ to participate.

title: Virtual Panel: Women in Film
description: A virtual panel discussion with Gillian Anderson and special guests from the film and television industry. Explore the experiences of women in entertainment, from navigating career challenges to celebrating achievements. Interactive Q&A allows participants to engage directly with the panel.
intensity: Recording will be available for 72 hours after the event.

title: Acting for Screen Workshop
description: An intensive two-day screen acting workshop with Gillian Anderson. Covering audition technique, on-camera performance, scene analysis, and the business of acting. Filmed exercises with playback and personalized feedback. Day two includes a mock audition with industry professionals. A transformative experience for any serious actor.
intensity: Professional headshot and acting CV required.

title: Creative Leadership Intensive
description: A two-day leadership intensive with Gillian Anderson at the historic Oxford Union. Designed for women in creative industries, this programme covers authentic leadership, navigating male-dominated spaces, building your personal brand, and creating lasting impact. Includes private coaching sessions, group workshops, and a formal dinner.
intensity: Accommodation and meals included.

title: The Want Anthology: Writing Circle
description: A writing circle inspired by Gillian Anderson's bestselling anthology WANT. Participants explore the theme of desire through guided writing exercises, group sharing, and thoughtful discussion. Gillian will share her editorial insights and the journey of bringing the anthology to life. Each participant leaves with the beginning of their own piece.
intensity: Open to all writing levels.

title: Sex Education: Series Screening & Talk
description: A special screening of selected episodes from Sex Education, followed by an intimate conversation with Gillian Anderson about playing Dr. Jean Milburn. Discover how she brought warmth, humour, and depth to one of television's most beloved characters. Includes a Q&A session.
intensity: Content may not be suitable for younger audiences.

title: Beachside Charity Walk with Gillian
description: A invigorating coastal walk along Brighton Beach with Gillian Anderson, raising funds for ocean conservation and mental health awareness. Enjoy the sea air, meaningful conversation, and the camaraderie of fellow fans. The walk concludes with a seaside lunch and a charitable donation on behalf of all participants.
intensity: Comfortable walking shoes and weather-appropriate clothing.

title: Six-Month Virtual Mentorship Programme
description: An exclusive six-month mentorship programme with Gillian Anderson. Monthly one-hour video calls, personalized feedback on your creative work, access to Gillian's network of industry professionals, and a culminating in-person meeting in London. This is a transformative commitment to your artistic and professional future. Applications are reviewed personally by Gillian.
intensity: Application required. Please submit a portfolio and personal statement.

title: Script Reading: The Fall
description: Travel to the hauntingly beautiful location where The Fall was filmed for a private script reading session with Gillian Anderson. Read scenes from the acclaimed series while visiting key filming locations. Gillian will share her approach to playing Stella Gibson and the experience of bringing the character to life.
intensity: Walking involved between locations.

title: Yoga & Breathwork Morning
description: Start your day with a gentle yoga and breathwork session guided by Gillian Anderson. Suitable for all levels, this morning practice focuses on grounding, presence, and setting intentions. A nourishing way to connect with yourself and the Sanctuary community.
intensity: A yoga mat and comfortable clothing recommended.

title: Virtual Archive Tour
description: A virtual tour of Gillian Anderson's personal archive, featuring never-before-seen photographs, costumes, scripts, and memorabilia. Gillian will guide you through the highlights of her career, sharing personal stories and memories associated with each item. A unique glimpse into entertainment history.
intensity: High-resolution images provided after the tour.

title: Seasonal Fan Gathering
description: A seasonal gathering of Sanctuary members in a city near you. Gillian Anderson makes a special appearance at each gathering, rotating through different global locations. Enjoy community activities, exclusive merchandise, a group photograph, and a warm celebration of the Sanctuary community.
intensity: Locations announced quarterly. Travel not included.

title: The Great Expectations Screening
description: A private screening of Great Expectations, featuring Gillian Anderson's acclaimed performance as Miss Havisham. Set in a historic London theatre, the evening includes a discussion of the adaptation process, period costume insights, and Gillian's approach to playing one of literature's most iconic characters.
intensity: Suitable for all ages.

title: Rooftop Sunset Reception
description: An elegant sunset reception on a private rooftop terrace overlooking the London skyline. Gillian Anderson welcomes guests with cocktails and canapés as the sun sets over the city. A live string quartet provides the soundtrack to an evening of sophisticated conversation and unforgettable views.
intensity: Cocktail attire. Venue has a strict capacity limit.

title: Advocacy & Activism Workshop
description: An intensive workshop on advocacy and activism with Gillian Anderson, drawing on her work as a UN Goodwill Ambassador and human rights advocate. Participants will learn effective campaigning strategies, public speaking techniques, and how to create meaningful change in their communities. Includes a visit to key Washington DC landmarks.
intensity: Comfortable walking shoes for the landmarks tour.
